summary: Completed comprehensive PWA and frontend testing for LABCEL San Antonio. All PWA features implemented correctly: manifest.json accessible with display:standalone, 8 icons, PWA meta tags in index.html, Service Worker registration working. All pages load correctly with futuristic design.
passed_tests: PWA manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with display:standalone, name, 8 icons
PWA meta tags in index.html: theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-touch-icon, manifest link
Service Worker registration in index.js - confirmed via console log
InstallPWA component renders without breaking the app
Home page loads correctly with futuristic green/cyan neon design
Catalog page /catalogo loads 2 products with correct prices ($180/$280)
Customizer page /personalizar loads with phone brand/model selection
Navbar navigation links work (Catálogo, Personalizar, Rastrear Pedido)
Footer renders with correct email labcelsanantonio@gmail.com
Mobile responsive layout works properly on 390x844 viewport
Track Order page /rastrear loads with order ID input

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI components and PWA features working)

seed_data_creation: Seed data endpoint /api/seed called during testing - creates 5 brands, 12 models, 2 products
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA implementation fully tested and working. Service Worker registers successfully, manifest.json has all required fields, all 8 icons accessible. Frontend pages (Home, Catalog, Customizer, Track Order) all load correctly. Mobile responsive design works. WhatsApp/Email notifications are MOCKED (no real Twilio/Resend keys).

mocked_apis.Twilio WhatsApp API: MOCKED - notifications marked as sent but not actually delivered
mocked_apis.Resend Email API: MOCKED - notifications marked as sent but not actually delivered
